title: Personalised Christmas Stockings, 15” Green Christmas Stocking Oversized Santa Socks Hanging Knitted Christmas Stockings Xmas Stocking for Christmas Holiday Party Decoration (Old Man)
features: Product Size: The size of the green Christmas stocking is 19*39*21cm, which is a conspicuous and festive size for hanging above the bed or as a decoration in your home.
Unique Design: This Xmas stocking sock features a unique green primary colour, contrasting with the traditional red Christmas socks, adding a touch of colour to your Christmas.

Exquisite Details: The personalised Christmas stockings have a vivid and funny Father Christmas pattern with a lifelike expression, as if Father Christmas is coming to you with a full of gifts, letting you feel a strong Christmas atmosphere in the festive season.

Multi-functional Use: Not only is it a large Christmas stocking that can be used to hold Christmas gifts, but it is also a decorative item with a great festive atmosphere. You can hang it above the bed, Christmas tree or any corner of the room to add a strong Christmas atmosphere to your home environment.

Holds a Lot of Gifts: This green Santa stocking has an amazingly large space. It is like a magic pocket that can easily hold all kinds of rich and diverse Christmas gifts. Whether it's a small, delicate piece of jewellery, a cute little toy or a warm scarf, it can hold it all. You can enjoy picking up all kinds of desirable gifts without worrying about the lack of space, because this stocking will carry all your full of love and surprise.
